'''âd-n-g''' ('''kadanag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ringfence|ringfence]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ringfence|ringfence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadanag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidanag|thidanag]] || [[word:jidanag|jidanag]] || [[word:shidanag|shidanag]] || [[word:kidanag|kidanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudanag|thuthudanag]] || [[word:jujudanag|jujudanag]] || [[word:shushudanag|shushudanag]] || [[word:kukudanag|kukudanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudanag|thudanag]] || [[word:judanag|judanag]] || [[word:shudanag|shudanag]] || [[word:kudanag|kudanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudanag|thudanag]] || [[word:judanag|judanag]] || [[word:shudanag|shudanag]] || [[word:kudanag|kudanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedanag|thedanag]] || [[word:jedanag|jedanag]] || [[word:shedanag|shedanag]] || [[word:kedanag|kedanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodanag|thothodanag]] || [[word:jojodanag|jojodanag]] || [[word:shoshodanag|shoshodanag]] || [[word:kokodanag|kokodanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodanag|thodanag]] || [[word:jodanag|jodanag]] || [[word:shodanag|shodanag]] || [[word:kodanag|kodanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodanag|thodanag]] || [[word:jodanag|jodanag]] || [[word:shodanag|shodanag]] || [[word:kodanag|kodanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdanag|thĂŠdanag]] || [[word:jĂŠdanag|jĂŠdanag]] || [[word:shĂŠdanag|shĂŠdanag]] || [[word:kĂŠdanag|kĂŠdanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadanag|thathadanag]] || [[word:jajadanag|jajadanag]] || [[word:shashadanag|shashadanag]] || [[word:kakadanag|kakadanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadanag|thadanag]] || [[word:jadanag|jadanag]] || [[word:shadanag|shadanag]] || [[word:kadanag|kadanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadanag|thadanag]] || [[word:jadanag|jadanag]] || [[word:shadanag|shadanag]] || [[word:kadanag|kadanag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadanag|shadanag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadanag|goshadanag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadanag|gokishadanag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadanagnĂŒ|shadanagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadanagnknĂŒ|goshadanagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanagnĂŒ|gokishadanagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadanagshĂ«|shadanagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadanagnkshĂ«|goshadanagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadanagshĂ«|gokishadanagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanagro|shadanagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanagnkro|goshadanagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanagro|gokishadanagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanagmu|shadanagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanagnkmu|goshadanagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanagmu|gokishadanagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadanagsher|shadanagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadanagnksher|goshadanagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadanagsher|gokishadanagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadanagng|shadanagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadanagnkng|goshadanagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadanagng|gokishadanagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadanagya|shadanagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadanagnkya|goshadanagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadanagya|gokishadanagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadanagyam|shadanagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadanagnkyam|goshadanagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadanagyam|gokishadanagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadanagnĂŒshĂ«|shadanagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadanagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadanagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadanagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadanagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanagnĂŒro|shadanagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanagnknĂŒro|goshadanagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanagnĂŒro|gokishadanagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanagnĂŒmu|shadanagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanagnknĂŒmu|goshadanagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanagnĂŒmu|gokishadanagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadanagshĂ«nĂŒ|shadanagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadanagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadanagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadanagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanagshĂ«ro|shadanagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanagnkshĂ«ro|goshadanagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanagshĂ«ro|gokishadanagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanagshĂ«mu|shadanagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanagnkshĂ«mu|goshadanagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanagshĂ«mu|gokishadanagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadanagronĂŒ|shadanagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadanagnkronĂŒ|goshadanagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanagronĂŒ|gokishadanagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadanagroshĂ«|shadanagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadanagnkroshĂ«|goshadanagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadanagroshĂ«|gokishadanagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanagromu|shadanagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanagnkromu|goshadanagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanagromu|gokishadanagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadanagmunĂŒ|shadanagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadanagnkmunĂŒ|goshadanagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanagmunĂŒ|gokishadanagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadanagmushĂ«|shadanagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadanagnkmushĂ«|goshadanagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadanagmushĂ«|gokishadanagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanagmuro|shadanagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanagnkmuro|goshadanagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanagmuro|gokishadanagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
